mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM novel_chapter_content WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND is_del = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM novel_outline WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND is_del = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM novel_world_setting WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND category = '人物' AND is_del = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM novel_world_setting WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND is_del = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM novel_review_issue WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND status = #{status} AND is_del = 0
